Class AbstractEdaAlgorithm<G>

java.lang.Object
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api.AbstractEdaAlgorithm<G>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Algorithm<G>
Direct Known Subclasses:
AdaptiveRatioEdaAlgorithm, RatioBasedEdaAlgorithm
public abstract class AbstractEdaAlgorithm<G> extends Object implements Algorithm<G>
Template-method base implementation for model-based algorithms.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    AbstractEdaAlgorithm()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    afterIteration(AlgorithmContext<G> context, Population<G> previous, Population<G> next)
    Optional hook for algorithm-specific per-iteration behavior.
    void
    complete(AlgorithmContext<G> context, Map<String,String> artifacts)
    Finalizes the run and emits completion event with artifact pointers.
    protected Fitness
    evaluateGenotype(AlgorithmContext<G> context, G feasibleGenotype, RngStream evaluationRng)
    Evaluates one feasible genotype.
    void
    initialize(AlgorithmContext<G> context)
    Initializes state before iterations start.
    void
    iterate(AlgorithmContext<G> context)
    Executes one iteration.
    protected Population<G>
    postProcessPopulation(AlgorithmContext<G> context, Population<G> previous, Population<G> next)
    Allows algorithm-specific population post-processing after replacement, niching, and restarts (for example random immigrants injection).
    void
    restoreState(AlgorithmState<G> restoredState)
    Restores internal state from checkpoint payload.
    RunResult<G>
    result()
    Returns final result after run completion.
    void
    run(AlgorithmContext<G> context)
    Runs initialize + iterate loop until stopping condition triggers.
    protected abstract int
    selectionSize(AlgorithmContext<G> context, Population<G> population)
    Returns how many individuals are used for model fitting.
    AlgorithmState<G>
    state()
    Returns current state snapshot.

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractEdaAlgorithm

      public AbstractEdaAlgorithm()

  • Method Details

    • selectionSize

      protected abstract int selectionSize(AlgorithmContext<G> context, Population<G> population)
      Returns how many individuals are used for model fitting.

    • afterIteration

      protected void afterIteration(AlgorithmContext<G> context, Population<G> previous, Population<G> next)
      Optional hook for algorithm-specific per-iteration behavior.

    • evaluateGenotype

      protected Fitness evaluateGenotype(AlgorithmContext<G> context, G feasibleGenotype, RngStream evaluationRng)
      Evaluates one feasible genotype.

      Specialized algorithms can override this hook for noisy resampling or surrogate-assisted evaluation while preserving the shared iteration flow.

    • postProcessPopulation

      protected Population<G> postProcessPopulation(AlgorithmContext<G> context, Population<G> previous, Population<G> next)
      Allows algorithm-specific population post-processing after replacement, niching, and restarts (for example random immigrants injection).
